title: antennaria montana
intro: Antennaria montana, also known as mountain everlasting or mountain pussyfoot, is a perennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. Traditionally, Antennaria montana has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that may help to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and combat infections. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. Antennaria montana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
